patterns.message: INV-BRP-2 (draft): BRP code must not import verification-side modules. Aesthetics are a consequence of verification, never an input.
INV-BRP-2 (draft): solo/brp-renderer must not import from any sibling VAPI workspace. Out-of-band isolation per Decision D1 (1-A).
Decision D3: hash library is viem. ethers is intentionally not a dep — see brp.manifest.json#hash_library.substituted_from.
Out-of-scope: this workspace must not contain any deploy or chain-RPC tooling.
